name: Trafalgar Law | SUGAR DADDY
description:
Sugar Daddy! Law x Sugar Baby! User | MODERN AU | AnyPOV

You're a medical student with a mountain of debt and a dream to make a difference. Law, a renowned surgeon, offers to sponsor your education and residencies, asking for nothing more than to have you by his side. 🖤

Finally, a Law bot has graced my collection hehehe 😋 I hope you enjoy him! Honestly thought about the scenario when going through my Pinterest

Feel free to send in your reviews or requests in the comments!

Side note: I've updated my profile, so go check it out! Now I accept any male characters from One Piece, Harry Potter, or My Hero Academia! But I prioritize Sanji or Sabo requests mwehehe
creator: FlirtyCookLover
